title: Fix EC2 clean-worktree Zephyr module path isolation
description: During project-LICHEN-t2hn.8.2 validation on EC2, a clean Git worktree plus isolated .west/config still resolved Zephyr module include paths for LICHEN through the dirty cached primary workspace (/mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN/lichen/subsys/...), causing the new native_sim meshtastic_gateway_adapter build to see stale meshtastic adapter headers and fail with incomplete lichen_meshtastic_incoming_text/status types. Need a robust clean validation workspace flow that keeps ZEPHYR_BASE/module paths cached but resolves the LICHEN module to the clean worktree, or a documented script for applying patches to an isolated copy without mutating the dirty primary worktree.
acceptance_criteria: EC2 validation can build a clean worktree while the prepared primary worktree is dirty; LICHEN module include paths resolve to the clean worktree; native_sim tests can run without copying changes into or cleaning the dirty primary workspace.
notes:
Implemented a project-owned EC2 clean-worktree helper and docs. Added tools/zephyr-clean-worktree.sh with create/setup/verify/verify-twister commands. The helper creates detached Git worktrees under /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work, writes local .west/config, links cached zephyr/modules/bootloader from the EBS primary workspace, requires -DZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=<clean>/lichen, and verifies Zephyr metadata resolves LICHEN through the clean worktree rather than /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN/lichen. Added docs/zephyr-ec2-clean-worktree.md and updated AGENTS.md plus Meshtastic/MeshCore smoke preflights to use the helper, SMOKE_REF defaulting, clean Python checks, and verify-twister for all planned Twister scenarios.

Safety/review fixes: removed raw rm -rf replacement fallback; create/setup reject the primary cache workspace and descendants; destinations must be under the work root; lexical normalization rejects .. escapes before mkdir; existing parent symlink escapes are rejected before creating destinations; cache/worktree/build paths are canonicalized; verify accepts clean LICHEN module root with either absolute or variable CMake-dir field; verify-twister reads testplan.json, normalizes slash-qualified platform dirs, searches detailed Twister layouts, fails missing zephyr_modules.txt, fails malformed runnable suite metadata, and propagates Python scanner failures before verification loops.

Review evidence: multiple independent review rounds found and fixed P1/P2 issues in replacement safety, path normalization, setup guardrails, smoke-doc ref handling, optional patch copy-pasteability, Twister all-scenario coverage, platform normalization, flexible module tuple handling, and Python failure propagation. Final reviewers Darwin and Anscombe reported no P0/P1/P2 findings.

Local validation: bash -n tools/zephyr-clean-worktree.sh passed; git diff --check passed.

EC2 validation on i-05e27e074db786e22 with EBS vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58 mounted and dirty primary /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN preserved: direct canary created /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-7el3-validate, west topdir matched the clean worktree, meshtastic_gateway_adapter native_sim built and ran PASS 15/15, and verify passed. Twister canary for meshtastic_gateway_adapter PASS 1/1 configs, 15 cases, 0 Twister warnings, verify passed. After guardrail fixes, primary-cache destination rejected; out-of-root .. path rejected without creating /mnt/lichen-zephyr/outside; setup /tmp rejected; nested primary-cache destination rejected; symlink escape under work root to /tmp rejected without creating target; link_crypto native_sim built and ran PASS 2/2 with verify passed. verify-twister passed on real link_crypto Twister output PASS 1/1 config, 2 cases, 0 warnings; passed synthetic slash-qualified platform output; passed synthetic detailed Twister path output; verify accepted a synthetic  third-field tuple; malformed runnable suite metadata failed as expected even after a valid suite appeared first. Twister emits the Zephyr/pkg_resources deprecation warning before execution, but Twister reported 0 warnings.
close_reason: Completed: clean EC2 Zephyr validation helper, docs, guardrails, direct native_sim and Twister evidence recorded.
